periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 72. Southwest wind around 10 mph.

periods.name: Friday
periods.short_forecast: Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 5pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 94. Southwest wind around 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

periods.name: Friday Night
periods.short_forecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 8pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and 1am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 75. Southwest wind around 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Saturday
periods.short_forecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 11am, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Partly sunny, with a high near 90. Southwest wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
